cases.notes: Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic changes the visual-order glyph sequence for سلام beyond pure RTL reordering of raw cmap glyph IDs, giving bounded joining-form evidence without promoting full Arabic support.
Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic proves a bounded base-plus-mark case by tying the positioning or zero-advance check to the mark cluster itself.
Single-run shaping emits the paragraph-owned bidi diagnostic instead of silently approximating mixed Arabic/LTR layout, while still returning shaped output.

remainingGates.detail: Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic now has a bounded runtime check for logical text \u0644\u0627 changing away from the raw visual-order cmap sequence, but this wave still does not prove a ticket-ready lam-alef ligature/feature-local positive row; keep the explicit lam-alef gate open until reviewed ligature evidence lands.
Positive cursive-attachment evidence is still proven only on the bounded reviewed M6-005 fixture family, not yet on the vendored Noto Arabic ticket-local fixture wave.
Dedicated arabic-missing-cursive/arabic-missing-mark fixtures and narrower text.shaping.arabic-* refusal codes remain absent; generic gdef/mark/cursive diagnostics stay separate evidence for now.
